phoenix-account-service · Java 21 · Spring Boot 3.1.7

Account API

Identity, institutions, users, organisations.

433 endpoints 59 areas 71 paginated

§Foundations

Overview

Service
Account
Artifact
phoenix-account-service
Description
Microservice to handle accounts service
Surface
433 endpoints across 59 areas

Authorization

  • (no explicit gate) — 289 of 433 (67%)
  • isValidUser — 72 of 433 (17%)
  • isValidInstitutionUser — 70 of 433 (16%)
  • isValidOrgAdmin — 1 of 433 (0%)
  • isValidOrgUser — 1 of 433 (0%)

Pagination

Endpoints binding Spring Pageable accept the standard page, size, and sort query parameters.

71 endpoints: /auditEntities, /idps, /institutions/{institutionId}/commonUsers, /institutions/{institutionId}/idp, /institutions/{institutionId}/ipRanges, /institutions/{institutionId}/refererUrls, …

Response envelope

Most handlers return ResponseEntity<APIResponse>. Endpoint detail describes the inner data payload.

{
  "status":  <int>,
  "error":   { ... } | null,
  "data":    <object> | null,
  "traceId": "..."
}

§Endpoints by area

Controller 34 endpoints Controller
GET /auditEntities get Audit Entities Admin
paginated

Query parameters

Common pagination only — see Pagination.

Response data

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of DtoListWrapper<AuditEntityDTO>. serialVersionUID · status · error · data · traceId
ExampleDtoListWrapperinside APIResponse.data 
{
  "key": "string",
  "list": [
    {
      "id": 0,
      "entityName": "string",
      "auditEntityId": 0,
      "isActive": false,
      "isGdprEnabled": false,
      "displayName": "string"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "serialVersionUID": 0,
    "totalCount": 0,
    "totalPages": 0,
    "isFirst": false,
    "isLast": false,
    "pageNumber": 0,
    "pageSize": 0
  }
}
DtoListWrapper<AuditEntityDTO> 3 fields
key String
list array<AuditEntityDTO>
id Long
entityName String
auditEntityId Long
isActive Boolean
isGdprEnabled Boolean
displayName String
pagination PaginationMetaDTO

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint.
PATCH /externalTools/{id} update External Tools
patch

Path parameters

NameTypeNotes
idlong

Request body

ExampleExternalToolDTO 
{
  "id": 0,
  "tenantId": 0,
  "serviceName": "string",
  "serviceDisplayName": "string",
  "settings": {},
  "isActive": false,
  "isDeleted": false,
  "createdtime": null,
  "updatedtime": null
}
ExternalToolDTO 9 fields
id Long
tenantId Long
serviceName String
serviceDisplayName String
settings ObjectNode
isActive Boolean

POST /identityLogin generate Login Token Pre-login
post

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
userDatabooleanoptional · default false

Request body

Examplemap<String, IdentityLoginRequestDTO> 
{
  "string": {
    "idp": "string",
    "token": "string"
  }
}
Map<String, IdentityLoginRequestDTO> [<key>] 2 fields
idp String
token String

Response data

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of IdentityLoginResponseDTO. serialVersionUID · status · error · data · traceId

paginated

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
querystringoptional
idsset<long>optional
includeConvertedbooleanoptional · default false
statusset<string>optional
filterValueslist<string>optional
departmentset<string>optional

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

InstitutionData 7 fields
institution InstitutionDTO
institutions array<InstitutionDTO>
users Object
filters array<FilterDTO>
_pagination PaginationMetaDTO
orderDetails InstitutionOrderDetailsDTO
notOnboardedInstitutions array<NotOnboardedInstitutionDto>

GET /institutionsByDomain get Institutions By Email Domain
paginated

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
querystringoptional
domainstringoptional

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

Response data

institution InstitutionDTO
institutions array<InstitutionDTO>
users Object

_pagination PaginationMetaDTO
orderDetails InstitutionOrderDetailsDTO

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint.

delete

POST /institutions create Institution
post

InstitutionData 7 fields
institution InstitutionDTO
institutions array<InstitutionDTO>
users Object
filters array<FilterDTO>
_pagination PaginationMetaDTO
orderDetails InstitutionOrderDetailsDTO
notOnboardedInstitutions array<NotOnboardedInstitutionDto>

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint.
GET /sites/{siteId}/institutions/{institutionId} get Institution

Path parameters

NameTypeNotes
siteIdstring
institutionIdstring

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdno

Response data

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of InstitutionData. serialVersionUID · status · error · data · traceId

InstitutionData 7 fields
institution InstitutionDTO
institutions array<InstitutionDTO>
users Object
filters array<FilterDTO>
_pagination PaginationMetaDTO
orderDetails InstitutionOrderDetailsDTO
notOnboardedInstitutions array<NotOnboardedInstitutionDto>

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint.
PUT /sites/{siteId}/institutions/{institutionId} update Institution
put

Path parameters

NameTypeNotes
siteIdlong
institutionIdlong

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdyes

institution InstitutionDTO

users Object

InstitutionData 7 fields
institution InstitutionDTO
institutions array<InstitutionDTO>
users Object
filters array<FilterDTO>
_pagination PaginationMetaDTO
orderDetails InstitutionOrderDetailsDTO
notOnboardedInstitutions array<NotOnboardedInstitutionDto>

Used by

No UI pages found in the Angular theme that consume this endpoint.
GET /sites/{siteId}/institutions list Institutions
paginated

Path parameters

NameTypeNotes
siteIdstring

Request headers

NameRequiredDefault · notes
tenantIdno

Query parameters

NameTypeNotes
querystringoptional

Plus the common pagination parameters — see Pagination.

Response data

APIResponse envelopes a data slot of InstitutionData. serialVersionUID · status · error · data · traceId
